title: Classify .excn/hooks.config.json as variant in the update path
description: package-qa observation (sprint 4): hooks.config.json is invariant-classed in stamp-policy.js, so any Instance that flips toggles sees it reported as drifted on every update run — safe (never overwritten) but noisy. Decide variant-classing it (toggles are per-Instance state) or excluding it from drift reporting.
acceptance_criteria: update on an Instance with flipped toggles reports no hooks.config.json drift
fix: hooks.config.json variant-classed in stamp-policy.js; flipped toggles no longer drift-reported; stale marker hash drops on next update. Gates PASS.
notes: Filed 2026-06-10 from the final sprint-4 package-qa observation.
